title: Strategy filed to expand its capital-raising programs, launching new ATM offerings of up to $21 billion in MSTR common stock, $21 billion in STRC preferred s...
message_html: Strategy filed to expand its capital-raising programs, launching new ATM offerings of up to $21 billion in MSTR common stock, $21 billion in STRC preferred s... ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Strategy filed to expand its capital-raising programs, launching new ATM offerings of up to $21 billion in MSTR common stock, $21 billion in STRC preferred stock, and $2.1 billion in STRK preferred stock. The company also increased authorized STRC shares to 282.6 milli
